hero.heading: We can change the World,
hero.subheading: All living beings are our fellow travellers on this planet. They have as much right to live in peace and happiness as we do. Treelands Foundation works to build green, prosperous and sustainable communities.

intro.heading: A not-for-profit led by India's most experienced forest officers
body: Treelands Foundation is a not-for-profit company established under Section 8 of the Companies Act, 2013. It is owned and managed by very senior retired officers with decades of field experience in Forestry, Wildlife, Biodiversity, Watershed Development, Environmental Management and Climate Change.
We use our experience and expertise to influence public policy and work with local communities and entrepreneurs — without a profit motive — to expand the natural resource base.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be a friend, philosopher and guide to the needy on sustainable natural resources management, climate change and eco-friendly living. Build green, prosperous and sustainable communities.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: Motivate individuals, empower communities, conserve and expand the natural resources and build a green future through collaborative action — working with communities and entrepreneurs without a profit motive.

values.title: Experienced Team
values.text: Retired senior forest officers with over a century of combined field experience guiding every project.

values.title: Equitable Development
values.text: Prioritising the socio-economic development of tribal and local communities through natural resources.

values.title: Living in Harmony
values.text: Balancing human needs with nature conservation to make Earth a happy planet for all life.
